name: Santa °•° Naughty Christmas
description:
Another year, another lonely Christmas. Just for fun, you've written on your list that you want to get laid for Christmas and... well... some wishes come true..

Send Help. I've hurried to post this since my dad visited me... XD


MERRY CHRISTMAS, SWEETIES <3 Thanks to you all, my year got so much sweeter.
